name: Ma Dai
page_title: Ma Dai 馬岱 [Ma Teng, Ma Chao, Shu] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes:
Ma Dai was a cousin of Ma Chao, a famous officer of Shu-Han. (de Crespigny 641) In the year AD 234, Zhuge Liang died. (1) Thereafter, Wei Yan and Yang Yi, two generals of Shu-Han, disagreed on the proper course of action to follow with regard to continuing Zhuge Liang’s campaigns. Both generals labeled each other traitors, but Wei Yan eventually lost support. Yang Yi dispatched Ma Dai to pursue and kill Wei Yan, which Ma Dai was able to do successfully. (2)

1: Chronicles of the Three Kingdoms, AD 234, Point 26[/URL]

2: Chronicles of the Three Kingdoms, AD 234, Point 31[/URL]

full_text:
Ma Dai 馬岱
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ma Dai (馬岱). Ma Chao’s cousin. He surrendered to Liu Bei with Ma Chao. Ma Dai was affiliated with Ma Teng, Ma Chao, and the Shu Kingdom.

BiographyHistoric (Confirmed)
Ma Dai was a cousin of Ma Chao, a famous officer of Shu-Han. (de Crespigny 641) In the year AD 234, Zhuge Liang died.(1)Thereafter, Wei Yan and Yang Yi, two generals of Shu-Han, disagreed on the proper course of action to follow with regard to continuing Zhuge Liang’s campaigns. Both generals labeled each other traitors, but Wei Yan eventually lost support. Yang Yi dispatched Ma Dai to pursue and kill Wei Yan, which Ma Dai was able to do successfully.(2)
1:Chronicles of the Three Kingdoms, AD 234, Point 26[/URL]
